title: Secret
description:
Screen every tool output for secrets, using a library to detect secrets.
  - edit secrets out by default, using placeholders
  - there should be a flag to show secrets in tool outputs, toggled by a command, set to mask secrets out by default

title: DropMessage
description: A command to drop context part which is from last User message (including the last User message) till the end of context

title: WebUI
description:
Create a web UI for eggthreads/egg.
  - Maybe based on jupyter notebooks
  - Should have all the features of egg (TUI), can have more

title: Sandboxing
description:
This should be a feature of eggthreads library.
Implement tool execution sandboxing using
  - @anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime
    - installed with npm install -g @anthropic-ai/sanbox-runtime
    - used as a command line tool:
      ```bash
      # Run a command in the sandbox
      srt echo "hello world"
      
      # With debug logging
      srt --debug curl https://example.com
      
      # Specify custom settings file
      srt --settings /path/to/srt-settings.json npm install
      ```
    - configuration example
      ```json
      {
        "network": {
          "allowedDomains": [
            "github.com",
            "*.github.com",
            "lfs.github.com",
            "api.github.com",
            "npmjs.org",
            "*.npmjs.org"
          ],
          "deniedDomains": ["malicious.com"],
          "allowUnixSockets": ["/var/run/docker.sock"],
          "allowLocalBinding": false
        },
        "filesystem": {
          "denyRead": ["~/.ssh"],
          "allowWrite": [".", "src/", "test/", "/tmp"],
          "denyWrite": [".env", "config/production.json"]
        },
        "ignoreViolations": {
          "*": ["/usr/bin", "/System"],
          "git push": ["/usr/bin/nc"],
          "npm": ["/private/tmp"]
        },
        "enableWeakerNestedSandbox": false
      }
      ```
  - docker

title: openai-requests-api-support
description: Make eggllm support openai requests API

title: AnthropicAPI
description:
Enable the use of Anthropic api in eggllm
  - should support caching

title: beadsIntegration
description: --beads flag on command line to add beads part of system prompt to system prompt, everything else for using beads

title: Testing
description: Create tests for all the functionality of the code, so that when we develop something we know we didn't break something.
